title: × Graptoveria haworthioides
intro: Graptoveria haworthioides, also known as the Mother of Millions or Moonstone, is a succulent plant species that is a hybrid of Graptoveria and Haworthia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of Graptoveria haworthioides include flavonoids, glycosides, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Graptoveria haworthioides is commonly prepared as a tincture or dried extract, often used to support digestive health and immune function, although its use is not without controversy due to concerns over its potential toxicity.
taxonomy: × Graptoveria haworthioides is a hybrid succulent plant, specifically a cross between Graptoveria and Haworthia species. It is classified as a succulent plant within the Asparagaceae family. Within the Asparagaceae family, it is further categorized as part of the subfamily Xanthioideae. × Graptoveria haworthioides is a type of crassulacean acid metabolism (CAM) plant, meaning it has adapted to conserve water in arid environments. This plant is native to Mexico and is known for its unique, compact rosette growth habit.
uses: × Graptoveria haworthioides has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Some studies suggest that × Graptoveria haworthioides may also have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential applications. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using × Graptoveria haworthioides or any other plant for medicinal purposes.

properties: × Graptoveria haworthioides, also known as the fairy castle or fairy castle aloe, is a low-maintenance succulent.
